differential_diagnoses: Nutritional optic neuropathy (Vitamin B12 or folate deficiency)
next_steps: Obtain serum vitamin A, retinol-binding protein, and vitamin B12 levels
Emergent ophthalmology consultation for comprehensive evaluation
Consult nutrition/dietetics for assessment of severe restrictive eating
Consider serum copper, zinc, and other micronutrient panels
Consult pediatric neurology to rule out associated neurological complications of malnutrition
